series_metadata.series_description: Labor disputes involving work stoppage, because of strike or lockout. Relevant to determine benefit eligibility. Files include: informal report (BEN 194), completed by local offices regarding possible labor disputes; labor dispute questionnaires (UC-440 and UC-441), completed by companies and unions involved in labor disputes; claimant lists; hearing transcripts; labor dispute determinations; and intra-agency correspondence regarding labor disputes.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office from end of labor dispute ; Electronic: electronic copies 2 years
